description: Serial killer Dennis Nilsen narrates his life and horrific crimes via a series of chilling audiotapes recorded from his jail cell.

It's love at first sight for a young couple repelled by the concept of marriage, but their view shifts when they meet their older-couple neighbors.
Tired of swiping through the dating scene with her besties in tow, a charming yet awkward woman with a rare genetic disorder sets her sights on love.
Fleeing unrest in their native Nepal, three young siblings separated from their parents must beat the odds to survive on their own in India.
In 1946 Berlin, an American cop searches for his missing brother while helping a novice German policewoman fight the violent crimes engulfing the city.

Project: The Secret Diary of an Exchange Student
description: Looking to shake things up, two best friends embark on a life-changing adventure abroad as exchange students. But can they stay out of trouble?
Christy Martin broke boundaries and noses as she rose in the boxing world, but her public persona belied personal demons, abuse and a threat on her life.
Classic nursery rhymes and children's songs get a fresh twist in this high-energy program that helps kids learn as they dance and sing along.
After a night of boozy carousing, a local newscaster finds herself stranded on the streets of LA just hours before the job interview of a lifetime.

director: Bejoy Nambiar, Priyadarshan, Karthik Narain, Vasanth Sai, Karthik Subbaraj, Arvind Swamy, Rathindran R Prasad, Sarjun, Gautham Vasudev Menon
description: From amusement to awe, the nine human emotions of Indian aesthetic theory are explored in this anthology series.
From chefs and comedians to filmmakers and fashion designers, India’s most notable imaginative minds share their artistic journeys.
In this animated fantasy, a girl named Bloom befriends a band of fairies, then follows them into the secretive and dangerous "Magical Dimension."
An American tourist goes on the run in Greece after a tragic accident plunges him into a political conspiracy that makes him a target for assassination.
A filmmaker heads to Hollywood in the early '90s to make her movie but tumbles down a hallucinatory rabbit hole of sex, magic, revenge — and kittens.
A government agency recruits teen driver Tony Toretto and his thrill-seeking friends to infiltrate a criminal street racing circuit as undercover spies.
Ten years after losing two loved ones, a man is plunged into another dizzying mystery when his girlfriend vanishes. Based on a Harlan Coben novel.
They’re not friends, but when their husbands leave them for each other, proper Grace and eccentric Frankie begin to bond in this Emmy-nominated series.
After his running mate's murder, a controversial televangelist becomes Argentina's presidential candidate. But nothing about him is as holy as he seems.
A writer in creative and marital crises finds support from three friends, who are also discovering themselves. Based on the novels by Elísabet Benavent.
The bullied outcasts at prestigious Al Rawabi School for Girls plot a series of risky takedowns to get back at their tormentors.
Through songs and puns, comedian Lokillo Florez hilariously reviews how Latin Americans have adjusted to a new world where no-hugging policies prevail.

Project: Monster Hunter: Legends of the Guild
description: In a world where humans and fearsome monsters live in an uneasy balance, young hunter Aiden fights to save his village from destruction by a dragon.
Expert bakers elevate desserts with next-level ideas and epic execution. Now the battle is on to win over clients in need of very special sweets.
After losing all memories of his past, a wealthy lawyer travels to a rural village where a woman he once loved now lives with her son.
A woman from a tough neighborhood outside Mexico City comes home a rock star, inadvertently provoking a confrontation with the ghosts of her past.
As a little girl, she escaped the Holocaust and lived among wolves. Or did she? An extraordinary story elicits sympathy — then draws scrutiny.
Determined to make the most of her final summer before college, Elle plans the ultimate bucket list as she navigates what comes next with Noah and Lee.
Decades after World War II, a still-shattered soldier unexpectedly falls in love and sees a bizarre coincidence bring his past back into focus.
Cute cats, quirky crafts and colorful magic! Join kitty enthusiast Gabby and her sidekick Pandy Paws as they team up for a series of animated adventures.
A workaholic who lost interest in romance reunites with an old flame and gifted music composer, who's determined to restore her belief in love.
Based on the book "Las Fantásticas," this exciting telenovela follows the tumultuous lives of five women who get mixed up with the Mafia.
Standing in for an unhinged Joseon king, a look-alike clown plays the part but increasingly becomes devoted to protecting the throne and the people.
Key figures from an infamous 2004 incident between players and fans at an NBA game in Michigan discuss the fight, its fallout and its lasting legacy.
Medium Yoh Asakura enters a battle tournament held every 500 years, competing with other shamans in a bid to become the all-powerful Shaman King.
To save their posh retirement home, former opera stars plan a gala recital — until the biggest diva among them refuses to sing.
In pursuit of both success and validation, a group of tech-savvy individuals juggle intimate encounters, first impressions and romantic opportunities.
Superstar Hideaki Takizawa reimagines his acclaimed kabuki production for the screen, featuring the dynamic talents of idol group Snow Man.
After reuniting as middle-aged men, three kung-fu prodigies must set their differences aside and dust off their skills to avenge their beloved mentor.
A man searching for the truth behind his wife's death becomes caught up in a dangerous web of secrets and intrigue stretching from New York to Tel Aviv.
In this sequel to "New Money," Quam, a security guard turned multimillionaire, lives the good life with his fortune until he falls victim to fraud.
A single mother breeds locusts as high-protein food, but has trouble getting them to reproduce — until she finds they have a taste for blood.
A music-loving kinkajou embarks on the journey of a lifetime to fulfill his destiny and deliver a love song for an old friend.
A decade after the seminal Brazilian film "City of God," this documentary reunites some of the cast and crew to find out what paths their lives took.
Cora has three sons and a daughter and she´s almost 80. One day during a family reunion the big question comes up: who will be her heir?

Project: Lady Boss: The Jackie Collins Story
description: "Queen of Sleaze" or feminist pioneer? Powerhouse novelist Jackie Collins created a brash sex-positive persona while hiding her private struggles.
One of the first rock stars in Argentina, Tango leads a full life during an era of social unrest – one of both glory and despair.
When her husband is accused of taking part in an attempted military coup, a pregnant woman's life takes an emotional turn. Inspired by true events.
The son of Jewish immigrants, David Geffen emerged from a humble upbringing to become one of the most powerful media personalities in America.
The colorful crew at Gotham Garage overhauls an eclectic collection of cars and trucks, trading up to a showstopper they can sell for big bucks.

Project: Cocaine Cowboys: The Kings of Miami
description: Two childhood friends go from high school dropouts to the most powerful drug kingpins in Miami in this true story of a crime saga that spanned decades.
When a hacker begins releasing students' secrets to the entire high school, the socially isolated but observant Sofía works to uncover his/her identity.
With an anyone-can-cook attitude, Paris Hilton adds her own flair to every dish. Fun is just one edible glitter bomb away on this unique cooking show.
When a spooky werewolf tale scares Boog out of joining the annual camping trip, his friends hatch a plan to cure him of his fear.
Overweight Victor hides from the world making pizzas in his mother's gloomy dive until a new waitress blows in and disrupts his isolation.
When her sister is accused of multiple murders, a Nigerian woman travels to Los Angeles to uncover the truth and fight for her sibling’s freedom.
A department store mogul has his son work incognito in a menial job to prove his worthiness, while female co-workers teach him how normal people live.
Ex-leaders and a survivor of the so-called "conversion therapy" movement speak out about its harm to the LGBTQ+ community and its devastating persistence.
Max S. reveals how he built a drug empire from his childhood bedroom in this story that inspired the series "How to Sell Drugs Online (Fast)."

Project: The Prince Who Turns into a Frog
description: Before his wedding, a cold CEO is hit by a car and awakens a changed man. As he and the driver fall in love, more changes appear on the road ahead.
Though claims of extraterrestrial encounters have long been dismissed, many believe the existence of UFOs is not just likely, but a certainty.
When two single guys learn a woman they both slept with disappeared after giving birth, they decide to raise her baby girl together as a family.
A young woman's romantic cruise ends in a twist when she gets pregnant after a one-night stand with a rich executive, turning their lives upside down.
Liz Lemon juggles the demands of running an NBC sketch comedy show with trying to fix her disaster of a personal life and eating her night cheese.
Paw-esome tales abound when singing furry friends Lampo, Milady, Pilou and Meatball band together.
After St. Bernard Beethoven sires a brood with Missy, he and the Newton kids must intervene when Missy's owner tries to sell the puppies.
This deftly animated take on a legendary Old English epic tells the timeless tale of a Scandinavian hero who's known for slaying dragons.
The fourth film in the action franchise finds Boyka taking on brutal gangsters to protect the widow of a man he unintentionally killed in the ring.
After their mother’s tragic death, a trio of sisters bond over their newfound powers, vanquish demons and band together to defend their magical legacy.
High schooler Kaname activates a mysterious mobile app and unwittingly joins a game pitting players with supernatural abilities against each other.
Eric Taylor faces enormous pressure when he signs on as the new coach of a small-town Texas football team that's poised to win the state championship.
Every time Chuck breaks up with a girlfriend, she ends up engaged to her next boyfriend. Soon, women are dating Chuck in hopes of meeting Mr. Right.
To fulfill his dreams of becoming a legendary Hunter like his dad, a young boy must pass a rigorous examination and find his missing father.
A workaholic reconnects with two men she blocked on social media five years ago and begins to reflect on her past life choices.
A hardened Marine is given his marching orders and must now lead a disorderly group of mismatched cadets into a junior ROTC competition.
A teen makes surprising discoveries when she talks to her dead mother's high school friends for an essay about someone she admires but has never met.
After his brother dies in a car crash, a disgraced MMA fighter takes over the family nightclub — and soon learns his sibling's death wasn’t an accident.
After landing on a planet reminiscent of 1950s suburbia, a human astronaut tries to avoid capture, recover his spaceship and make it home safely.
After moving to a retirement community, loner Martha befriends a fun-loving neighbor and forms a cheerleading club for young-at-heart seniors.
A retired engineer agrees to help NASA prevent a Russian satellite from falling to Earth if he and his over-the-hill pals can man the mission.

Project: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia
description: A couple's Georgia dream home becomes a living nightmare when their daughter begins to have frightening visions from the property's terrible past.
A computer analyst becomes a target after she stumbles onto a conspiracy via a mysterious floppy disk, forcing her to go on the run to clear her name.
Comedians Steve Harvey, Cedric the Entertainer, D.L. Hughley and Bernie Mac hit the stage in an iconic stand-up concert directed by Spike Lee.
Crushed when she doesn't qualify for the Olympics, a now-grown Maddy Cornell finds new purpose coaching young gymnasts going up against a rival team.
An aspiring filmmaker grapples with her decision to study abroad in Norway when she meets an insightful but peculiar owner of a curious coffee shop.
On a quest to reunite with her trusty rider, a fearless war horse journeys through a whimsical world filled with magic, adventure and singing centaurs.
After a decade in prison, a Palestinian man with a dark secret returns to the West Bank and searches for the daughter he lost long ago.
In this competition show, aspiring makeup artists navigate colorful challenges to win a career-making opportunity in the beauty industry.
Glimpse into the life and decades-long career of Turkish performer Metin Akpınar through personal interviews with him and his contemporaries.
Saudi media personality Ahmad Al Shugairi travels around the world on a quest for knowledge in various cities while offering his personal reflections.
In the automotive world, John DeLorean rose from engineer to executive to icon. But under the hood of his self-created legend lies darkness and deceit.
On an island of haves and have-nots, teen John B enlists his three best friends to hunt for a legendary treasure linked to his father's disappearance.
After her husband is placed under Israeli detention, a Palestinian newlywed is left to deal with the fallout, resorting to her passion for Dabke to cope.
A legendary secret agent-turned-mercenary comes out of hiding to save the son he's never met. Learning how to be a dad may be his toughest mission yet.
When a young florist who's long dreamed of her wedding day gets dumped by her boyfriend, she sets out to win him back with help from a handsome actor.
Reeling from a broken heart and career meltdown, a singer takes a gig at a swanky island resort — where her ex-fiancé happens to be getting married.
The frantic race to locate the Allspark first culminates on a strange planet as the future comes crashing through to the present day.

Project: Chhota Bheem & Krishna: Pataliputra- City of the Dead
description: Krishna needs Bheem’s help: The ruined city of Pataliputra has been cursed! Can the friends do what it takes to bring light back into this town?
Delve into the magical world of fungi, from mushrooms that clear oil spills to underground fungal networks that help trees communicate.
Bad tattoos walk in. Great tattoos walk out. Top artists transform tattoo disasters into stunning cover-ups, with designs chosen by clients' loved ones.
Over four decades, two brothers in Cali juggle family duties, multiple romances and illegal businesses, transforming from poor kids to cocaine kingpins.
Culture clashes and brewing rivalries test a teen football player from South Los Angeles when he’s recruited to the Beverly Hills High School team.
Two cops form a task force to take down two mobsters, but when a sinister politician enters the picture, dubious loyalties and motives come to light.
A realtor and her daughter get taken captive by two fugitive criminals during an open house, forcing her to find creative ways to ensure their survival.
To win back his ex-girlfriend, a nerdy teen starts selling ecstasy online out of his bedroom – and becomes one of Europe's biggest dealers.
Catch a ride with the Mighty Express — a team of trains and their kid friends who overcome trouble on the tracks with quick thinking and teamwork!
An aspiring actress in a small town agrees to bear a child for a visiting couple seeking a surrogate mother, but her experience takes unexpected turns.

Project: Plastic Cup Boyz: Laughing My Mask Off!
description: Comedy collective The Plastic Cup Boyz pour out the punchlines in Atlanta during a trio of raw and lively stand-up specials.

country: France, Israel, Germany, United States, United Kingdom
description: Working as a Mossad spy assigned to Tehran, Rachel reaches her breaking point. Now it’s dangerously hard to tell whose side she’s on.
In the wake of a zombie apocalypse, survivors hold on to the hope of humanity by banding together to wage a fight for their own survival.
The outcast descendant of lawman Wyatt Earp teams up with an immortal Doc Holliday to rid the world of demonic revenants from the Wild West.
The doctors and nurses of Gaffney Chicago Medical Center juggle the busy ER's dramas and dangers in this spinoff of "Chicago Fire" and "Chicago P.D."
A disgruntled South African woman leaves her fiancé and embezzles money from her job to pursue her dream of being a Broadway star in New York City.
Two directionless millennial bros get high and pitch a bold new social justice app that raises millions. Then they have to come up with the app.
When a group of terrorists hijacks an overnight transatlantic flight, a mysteriously ill woman must unleash a monstrous secret to protect her young son.
Short films follow young adults as they navigate the gamut of emotions that come with finding romantic connection in unexpected places.
Tragedy, betrayal and a mysterious discovery fuel a woman's vengeance for the loss of her tribe and family in this special episode of "Kingdom."
After a calamitous battle fractures Eternia, Teela and an unlikely alliance must prevent the end of the Universe in this sequel to the ’80s classic.

Project: Revelations: The Masters of the Universe: Revelation Aftershow
description: Take a behind-the-scenes look at “Masters of the Universe: Revelation” as showrunner Kevin Smith and others interview the cast about their iconic roles.
A fatal turn of events at a brothel sends three women haunted by their pasts on a wild run from their pimp and his henchmen.

Project: The Last Letter From Your Lover
description: After finding a trove of love letters from 1965, a reporter sets out to solve the mystery of a secret affair — while embarking on a romance of her own.
These blockbusters brought us together and gave us the time of our lives. Meet the actors, directors and industry insiders who made them happen.
In this documentary, female office workers in '70s Boston inspire change with a call for better pay, more opportunities and an end to sexual harassment.
When a scientist has trouble caring for his secret baby dinosaur, he takes Bheem and friends back in time to return the pet to its natural habitat.
Things get spooky when Bheem and his buddies travel to the border of Dholakpur, known for its eerie history and rumored to be haunted.
Bheem and Lord Ganesha join forces to save Dholakpur from fire-spitting dragons, who have also captured Ganesh’s mouse companion!
Young lord Krishna has fallen for demoness Maayandri’s revenge plot against him! Can Bheem rescue him and thwart Maayandri’s other destructive plans?
Thrust back to 1666, Deena learns the truth about Sarah Fier. Back in 1994, the friends fight for their lives — and Shadyside’s future.

Project: Chhota Bheem And The Broken Amulet
description: When a stranger tries to steal an amulet from the palace, Bheem learns the sad story behind the ornament and heads to Africa to defeat the real villain.

Project: Chhota Bheem And The Crown of Valhalla
description: To save the kingdom of Valhalla from invasion by Vikings, Bheem is gathering his army of friends, who are ready to put up a formidable fight!

Project: Chhota Bheem and the Incan Adventure
description: When Dholakpur’s princess is kidnapped, Bheem is off to the land of the Incas to save her, but he’s in for an even bigger challenge upon his arrival.

Project: Chhota Bheem and The ShiNobi Secret
description: After learning of a samurai village under threat by their own emperor, Bheem sets off for Japan to offer his help.
When two evil entities kidnap a princess in a plot to build a new kingdom, Bheem takes them on with the help of the courageous monkey god Hanuman.
Centuries after the end of a conqueror's rule, he is mysteriously back from the dead. It’s up to Bheem to save Dholakpur from being taken over!

Project: Chhota Bheem aur Krishna vs Zimbara
description: A demon of darkness is plotting world domination — but when Bheem and Krishna catch wind of his plans, they’ll stop at nothing to destroy him.
Bheem’s plans for an exciting African safari are interrupted when he finds that an evil ruler is using magical powers to cause drought through the land.
A faulty transportation machine lands Chhota Bheem and his friends in Russia, where they must save a princess from an evil, power-hungry magician.
Space invaders have kidnapped Dholakpur’s king and princess! The only way Bheem can rescue them? Defeat the aliens in a cricket match.
Bheem’s holiday in Nepal takes an unexpected turn when he is called on to save a monkey cub from snow leopards and reunite him with his father.
After a precious temple stone is stolen under his watch, Bheem trains in a special martial art to prepare for a showdown with the thief.
The king has been away to meet an old friend, but when he sends for urgent help, Bheem finds himself on an action-packed rescue mission to Egypt!
Summoned by a monk to help reclaim a temple from a dangerous leader, Bheem must master the Shaolin kung fu techniques if he wants a fighting chance!

Project: Chhota Bheem: The Rise of Kirmada
description: Bheem and young lord Krishna team up to protect the world against the wicked and powerful Kirmada and his equally dangerous bat army.
With the guidance of her relentless coach, a teen weightlifter emerges from a scrappy training camp in Egypt to compete at the championship level.
Separated as children, three cousins with an unshakeable bond confront their painful pasts and embark on an emotional journey to find each other.
When his newlywed wife becomes disenchanted because he failed to protect her from danger, Omar seeks the help of a quirky psychiatrist to win her back.

Project: Words Bubble Up Like Soda Pop
description: After meeting one bright, sunny day, a shy boy who expresses himself through haiku and a bubbly but self-conscious girl share a brief, magical summer.
Two cops must contend with the uncooperative tenants of an apartment complex as they try to solve a murder before the crime scene is wiped clean.
Hoping to say goodbye to superficial dating, real-life singles sport elaborate makeup and prosthetics to put true blind-date chemistry to the test.
Sizzling hot young Brazilians meet at a dreamy beach resort. But for a shot at R$500,000 in this fun reality show, they'll have to give up sex.

director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco
description: Heroes from "Trollhunters," "3Below" and "Wizards" join forces to fight a shadowy enemy threatening to take over their worlds — and reset Earth itself.
Aimless 20-something Milo impulsively becomes a gay man’s surrogate and wrestles with the emotional complexities of her non-traditional decision.
In 2000, a group of young men takes over a house in Buenos Aires, becoming squatters, while dealing with an increasingly violent and hostile city.
Hoping to make a comeback after a bad scandal, an actress agrees to research a new role by taking a job as a secretary for a prickly attorney.
In an impoverished neighborhood, the son of a swordsman falls in love with the daughter of a wedding singer — a taboo match in a traditional society.
In the year 2524, a disgraced retired general is called back into combat to help prevent an interstellar war against a hostile alien fleet.
A businessman returns home to Nigeria and falls in love with a friend's sister despite his family’s plan for him to marry a politician’s daughter.

director: Sita Likitvanichkul, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Thanabodee Uawithya, Adirek Wattaleela
description: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control — and must find a way out before it’s too late.
This enlightening series from Vox digs into a wide range of topics such as the rise of cryptocurrency, why diets fail, and the wild world of K-pop.
This documentary follows the Boston Renegades — an all-woman, tackle football team — as they risk their time, families and day jobs for the game.
How much trouble could one imaginative boy, his faithful dog and two science-loving sisters possibly get into? Hmm, that sounds like a challenge!
Following the brutal 1949 murder of a small Mexican town's mayor, genteel and humble janitor Juan Vargas is appointed his successor.
This intimate series follows Naomi Osaka as she explores her cultural roots and navigates her multifaceted identity as a tennis champ and rising leader.
During the Civil War, a wounded Union soldier takes refuge at a Southern girls school, rupturing the calm amid growing sexual tension and infighting.
An 11-year-old vows to help a new neighbor who he suspects is in danger, and documents his efforts in a series of written entries and audio recordings.

Project: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn: Part 1
description: After a dream wedding, Bella and Edward enter a new nightmare when a shocking development forces life-or-death decisions.

Project: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn: Part 2
description: In the epic series' final chapter, Bella and Edward's newborn daughter forces the couple into a life-altering confrontation with the Volturi.
Sparks fly when a fashion blogger in Bali meets a gifted shoemaker, leading her to question her commitment to her fiancé.
In a world where beasts of all kinds coexist, a gentle wolf awakens to his own predatory urges as his school deals with a murder within its midst.
Stoner comedians Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong arrive in Amsterdam to find they've been mistakenly invited, then take the stage live as a replacement act.

Project: Emicida: AmarElo - Live in São Paulo
description: Brazilian rapper Emicida brings his progressive rhymes and eclectic beats to São Paulo's Theatro Municipal as he performs hits from the album "AmarElo."
An art curator's life unravels, as she tries to keep her pastime as a die-hard K-pop fan secret from her gallery's new director.
Eager to rejoin her divorced parents, an inventor's daughter drives his time-traveling car back to 1982. But a secret crush accidentally follows.
Two unusually close friends share every aspect of their lives together. As their lives evolve, their bond remains the only constant.
After a traumatic year, all an Indian-American teen wants is to go from pariah to popular — but friends, family and feelings won’t make it easy on her.
Following a stint behind bars, a thief returns to where he buried his loot, only to find that his hiding spot is now a shrine to an unknown saint.
This documentary takes a deep look at gender disparity in Hollywood through the eyes of well-known actresses and female filmmakers.
In this gruesome suspense film, strangers traveling in southern Italy become stranded in the woods, where they must fight desperately to get out alive.
Follow Julia Haart, Elite World Group CEO and a former member of an ultra-Orthodox Jewish community, and her adult kids in this reality series.

Project: Private Network: Who Killed Manuel Buendía?
description: A deep dive into the work of renowned Mexican journalist Manuel Buendía looks to unravel his murder and the ties between politics and drug trafficking.

Project: The Guide to the Perfect Family
description: A couple in Québec deals with the pitfalls, pressure and high expectations of raising kids in a society obsessed with success and social media image.
